name: Automated Systems Holdings Limited
summary: Automated Systems Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides information technology (IT) services to corporate customers. It operates in two divisions, IT Products and IT Services. The company sells computer products and solutions. It also offers hardware services, including installation and maintenance; and software services, such as software development, consulting, and professional services. In addition, the company provides systems integration, engineering support for products and solutions, and managed services. Further, it is involved in the property holding, international trading, fund investment, and treasury management activities. Automated Systems Holdings Limited operates in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Macau, Thailand, and Taiwan. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong. Automated Systems Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Teamsun Technology (HK) Limited.
